'''Lanal Darklighter''' was the third wife of [[Huff Darklighter]], and the stepmother of [[Dera Darklighter|Dera]]. She was also the sister of [[Silya Darklighter]], making her [[Gavin Darklighter]]'s aunt on both sides of the family.

{{Char-stub}}
